candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash flow statement balances.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

Explicit short-term debt label; best semantic match when available.
Likely current financing-related liabilities and a plausible short-term debt proxy when explicit ST debt label is absent.
Debt-related label under current liabilities section, but current vs total is somewhat ambiguous.
Current debt-like item but leases must be excluded from STD baseline.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current maturity of lease liabilities, but leases must be excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Used explicit 'ST Debt' first, with 'Other current financial liabilities' as alternative label across years. Excluded lease rows per rule. Manual review needed because 'Other current financial liabilities' may include items beyond pure borrowings, and 'Interest-bearing loans' could overlap in some years.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct tax payable label exists even though preview values are blank.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for property, plant and equipment; preferable to cash flow capex lines and lease-specific gross rows.

candidates.why: Tangible asset related but lease-specific and gross; not preferred for baseline PPE total.
Cash flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangibles are not PPE.

variables.notes: Closest reported balance-sheet PPE-type line; avoided right-of-use lease-specific rows.
